            function updateCropCoordDisplay(container, crop) {
                if (!container || !crop) return;
                const coords = getCropCoords(crop);
                const xEl = container.querySelector('[data-coord=\"x\"]');
                const yEl = container.querySelector('[data-coord=\"y\"]');
                const x2El = container.querySelector('[data-coord=\"x2\"]');
                const y2El = container.querySelector('[data-coord=\"y2\"]');
                if (xEl) xEl.textContent = coords.x;
                if (yEl) yEl.textContent = coords.y;
                if (x2El) x2El.textContent = coords.x2;
                if (y2El) y2El.textContent = coords.y2;
            }
            function syncCropItemName(crop) {
                const itemEl = D.cropList.querySelector(`.crop-item[data-id="${crop.id}"]`);
                if (!itemEl) return;
                const nameInput = itemEl.querySelector('input[data-field="name"]');
                if (nameInput) nameInput.value = crop.name || '';
            }
            function updateCropFormatButtons(container, format) {
                if (!container) return;
                container.querySelectorAll('.segmented-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.value === format));
            }
            function handleCropMiniInput(e) {
                const crop = getCropById(state.crop.activeId);
                if (!crop) return;
                if (e.target.id === 'crop-mini-width' || e.target.id === 'crop-mini-height') {
                    const num = Math.max(MIN_CROP_SIZE, parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                    if (e.target.id === 'crop-mini-width') crop.w = Math.min(num, state.imageElement.width);
                    if (e.target.id === 'crop-mini-height') crop.h = Math.min(num, state.imageElement.height);
                    applyCropConstraints(crop);
                    updateCropOverlayItem(crop);
                    syncCropItemInputs(crop);
                    updateCropMiniPanel();
                }
                if (e.target.id === 'crop-mini-name') {
                    crop.name = e.target.value;
                    syncCropItemName(crop);
                    updateCropExportStatus();
                    updateCropMiniPanel();
                }
            }
            function handleCropMiniClick(e) {
                const crop = getCropById(state.crop.activeId);
                if (!crop) return;
                if (e.target.id === 'crop-mini-delete') {
                    removeCropItem(crop.id);
                    updateCropMiniPanel();
                    return;
                }
                if (e.target.id === 'crop-mini-export') {
                    exportCropItem(crop);
                    return;
                }
                const formatBtn = e.target.closest('.segmented-btn');
                if (formatBtn && formatBtn.dataset.value) {
                    crop.format = formatBtn.dataset.value;
                    updateCropFormatButtons(D.cropMiniFormat, crop.format);
                    const itemEl = D.cropList.querySelector(`.crop-item[data-id="${crop.id}"]`);
                    if (itemEl) updateCropFormatButtons(itemEl.querySelector('.crop-format-group'), crop.format);
                    updateCropExportStatus();
                }
            }
            function handleCropListInput(e) {
                const itemEl = e.target.closest('.crop-item');
                if (!itemEl) return;
                const id = parseInt(itemEl.dataset.id, 10);
                const crop = getCropById(id);
                if (!crop) return;
                setActiveCrop(id);
                const field = e.target.dataset.field;
                if (field === 'width' || field === 'height') {
                    const num = Math.max(MIN_CROP_SIZE, parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                    if (field === 'width') crop.w = Math.min(num, state.imageElement.width);
                    if (field === 'height') crop.h = Math.min(num, state.imageElement.height);
                    applyCropConstraints(crop, field === 'width' ? 1 : 0, field === 'height' ? 1 : 0);
                    updateCropOverlayItem(crop);
                    syncCropItemInputs(crop);
                }
                if (field === 'name') {
                    crop.name = e.target.value;
                    updateCropExportStatus();
                }
            }
            function removeCropItem(id) {
                const index = state.crop.items.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
                if (index === -1) return;
                state.crop.items.splice(index, 1);
                if (state.crop.syncNames) syncCropNames();
                if (!state.crop.items.find(item => item.id === state.crop.activeId)) {
                    state.crop.activeId = state.crop.items[0]?.id || null;
                }
                renderCropList();
                renderCropOverlay();
                updateCropExportStatus();
                updateCropCountInput();
            }
            function handleCropListClick(e) {
                const itemEl = e.target.closest('.crop-item');
                if (!itemEl) return;
                const id = parseInt(itemEl.dataset.id, 10);
                const crop = getCropById(id);
                if (!crop) return;
                if (e.target.classList.contains('crop-delete-btn')) {
                    removeCropItem(id);
                    return;
                }
                if (e.target.classList.contains('crop-export-btn')) {
                    exportCropItem(crop);
                    return;
                }
                const formatBtn = e.target.closest('.segmented-btn');
                if (formatBtn && formatBtn.dataset.value) {
                    crop.format = formatBtn.dataset.value;
                    itemEl.querySelectorAll('.segmented-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.value === crop.format));
                    updateCropExportStatus();
                    return;
                }
                setActiveCrop(id);
            }
            function renderCropOverlay() {
                if (!D.cropOverlay) return;
                D.cropOverlay.innerHTML = '';
                if (!state.imageElement) return;
                state.crop.items.forEach(item => {
                    const rect = document.createElement('div');
                    rect.className = `crop-rect${item.id === state.crop.activeId ? ' active' : ''}`;
                    rect.dataset.id = item.id;
                    applyCropRectStyles(rect, item);
                    D.cropOverlay.appendChild(rect);
                });
            }
            function applyCropRectStyles(element, crop) {
                const scaleX = state.display.scaleX || 1;
                const scaleY = state.display.scaleY || 1;
                element.style.left = `${crop.x / scaleX}px`;
                element.style.top = `${crop.y / scaleY}px`;
                element.style.width = `${crop.w / scaleX}px`;
                element.style.height = `${crop.h / scaleY}px`;
            }
            function updateCropOverlayItem(crop) {
                const rect = D.cropOverlay.querySelector(`.crop-rect[data-id="${crop.id}"]`);
                if (!rect) return;
                applyCropRectStyles(rect, crop);
            }
            function getResizeHandleForPoint(crop, offsetX, offsetY) {
                const scaleX = state.display.scaleX || 1;
                const scaleY = state.display.scaleY || 1;
                const rectX = crop.x / scaleX;
                const rectY = crop.y / scaleY;
                const rectW = crop.w / scaleX;
                const rectH = crop.h / scaleY;
                const threshold = 20;
                const nearLeft = Math.abs(offsetX - rectX) <= threshold;
                const nearRight = Math.abs(offsetX - (rectX + rectW)) <= threshold;
                const nearTop = Math.abs(offsetY - rectY) <= threshold;
                const nearBottom = Math.abs(offsetY - (rectY + rectH)) <= threshold;
                const withinX = offsetX >= rectX - threshold && offsetX <= rectX + rectW + threshold;
                const withinY = offsetY >= rectY - threshold && offsetY <= rectY + rectH + threshold;
                if (!(withinX && withinY)) return null;
                if (nearLeft && nearTop) return 'nw';
                if (nearRight && nearTop) return 'ne';
                if (nearLeft && nearBottom) return 'sw';
                if (nearRight && nearBottom) return 'se';
                if (nearTop) return 'n';
                if (nearBottom) return 's';
                if (nearLeft) return 'w';
                if (nearRight) return 'e';
                return null;
            }
            function isPointInsideCrop(crop, offsetX, offsetY) {
                const scaleX = state.display.scaleX || 1;
                const scaleY = state.display.scaleY || 1;
                const rectX = crop.x / scaleX;
                const rectY = crop.y / scaleY;
                const rectW = crop.w / scaleX;
                const rectH = crop.h / scaleY;
                return offsetX >= rectX && offsetX <= rectX + rectW && offsetY >= rectY && offsetY <= rectY + rectH;
            }
            function findCropHit(offsetX, offsetY) {
                const ordered = [];
                const active = getCropById(state.crop.activeId);
                if (active) ordered.push(active);
                for (let i = state.crop.items.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                    const item = state.crop.items[i];
                    if (!active || item.id !== active.id) ordered.push(item);
                }
                for (const crop of ordered) {
                    const handle = getResizeHandleForPoint(crop, offsetX, offsetY);
                    if (handle || isPointInsideCrop(crop, offsetX, offsetY)) {
                        return { crop, handle };
                    }
                }
                return null;
            }
            function getCursorForHandle(handle) {
                const cursorMap = {
                    n: 'ns-resize',
                    s: 'ns-resize',
                    e: 'ew-resize',
                    w: 'ew-resize',
                    nw: 'nwse-resize',
                    se: 'nwse-resize',
                    ne: 'nesw-resize',
                    sw: 'nesw-resize'
                };
                return cursorMap[handle] || 'move';
            }
            function updateCropCursor(e) {
                if (state.viewMode !== 'crop' || cropInteraction) return;
                const overlayRect = D.cropOverlay.getBoundingClientRect();
                const offsetX = e.clientX - overlayRect.left;
                const offsetY = e.clientY - overlayRect.top;
                const hit = findCropHit(offsetX, offsetY);
                if (!hit) {
                    D.cropOverlay.style.cursor = 'crosshair';
                    return;
                }
                D.cropOverlay.style.cursor = hit.handle ? getCursorForHandle(hit.handle) : 'move';
            }
            function exportCropItem(crop) {
                if (!state.imageElement || !crop.name || !crop.name.trim()) return;
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = Math.round(crop.w);
                canvas.height = Math.round(crop.h);
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                if (crop.format === 'jpeg') {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFFFFF';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                }
                ctx.drawImage(state.imageElement, crop.x, crop.y, crop.w, crop.h, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                const mimeType = `image/${crop.format}`;
                const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL(mimeType, 0.9);
                const link = document.createElement('a');
                link.href = dataUrl;
                link.download = `${crop.name}.${formatExtension(crop.format)}`;
                link.click();
            }
            function exportAllCrops() {
                if (!state.imageElement) return;
                updateCropExportStatus();
                const hasMissing = state.crop.items.some(item => !item.name || !item.name.trim());
                if (hasMissing) return;
                state.crop.items.forEach(item => exportCropItem(item));
            }
            function handleCropPointerDown(e) {
                if (state.viewMode !== 'crop' || !state.imageElement) return;
                const overlayRect = D.cropOverlay.getBoundingClientRect();
                const offsetX = e.clientX - overlayRect.left;
                const offsetY = e.clientY - overlayRect.top;
                if (offsetX < 0 || offsetY < 0 || offsetX > overlayRect.width || offsetY > overlayRect.height) return;
                const naturalX = offsetX * state.display.scaleX;
                const naturalY = offsetY * state.display.scaleY;
                const hit = findCropHit(offsetX, offsetY);
                if (hit) {
                    const crop = hit.crop;
                    setActiveCrop(crop.id);
                    if (hit.handle) {
                        cropInteraction = { type: 'resize', id: crop.id, handle: hit.handle, startX: naturalX, startY: naturalY, startRect: { x: crop.x, y: crop.y, w: crop.w, h: crop.h }, pointerId: e.pointerId };
                    } else {
                        cropInteraction = { type: 'move', id: crop.id, startX: naturalX, startY: naturalY, startRect: { x: crop.x, y: crop.y, w: crop.w, h: crop.h }, pointerId: e.pointerId };
                    }
                } else {
                    const newCrop = createCropItem(naturalX, naturalY, MIN_CROP_SIZE, MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                    state.crop.items.push(newCrop);
                    applyCropConstraints(newCrop);
                    if (state.crop.syncNames) {
                        syncCropNames();
                    } else {
                        const base = state.crop.baseName.trim();
                        newCrop.name = base ? `${base}-${state.crop.items.length}` : '';
                    }
                    setActiveCrop(newCrop.id);
                    renderCropList();
                    renderCropOverlay();
                    updateCropExportStatus();
                    cropInteraction = { type: 'create', id: newCrop.id, startX: naturalX, startY: naturalY, startRect: { x: newCrop.x, y: newCrop.y, w: newCrop.w, h: newCrop.h }, pointerId: e.pointerId };
                    updateCropCountInput();
                }
                D.cropOverlay.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
                document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
                e.preventDefault();
            }
            function handleCropPointerMove(e) {
                if (!cropInteraction || !state.imageElement || cropInteraction.pointerId !== e.pointerId) return;
                const overlayRect = D.cropOverlay.getBoundingClientRect();
                const offsetX = e.clientX - overlayRect.left;
                const offsetY = e.clientY - overlayRect.top;
                const naturalX = offsetX * state.display.scaleX;
                const naturalY = offsetY * state.display.scaleY;
                const crop = getCropById(cropInteraction.id);
                if (!crop) return;
                const dx = naturalX - cropInteraction.startX;
                const dy = naturalY - cropInteraction.startY;
                if (cropInteraction.type === 'move') {
                    crop.x = cropInteraction.startRect.x + dx;
                    crop.y = cropInteraction.startRect.y + dy;
                    applyCropConstraints(crop, dx, dy);
                }
                if (cropInteraction.type === 'resize') {
                    const { x: x0, y: y0, w: w0, h: h0 } = cropInteraction.startRect;
                    const maxW = state.imageElement.width;
                    const maxH = state.imageElement.height;
                    let x = x0;
                    let y = y0;
                    let w = w0;
                    let h = h0;
                    if (cropInteraction.handle.includes('e')) {
                        w = Math.min(Math.max(w0 + dx, MIN_CROP_SIZE), maxW - x0);
                    }
                    if (cropInteraction.handle.includes('s')) {
                        h = Math.min(Math.max(h0 + dy, MIN_CROP_SIZE), maxH - y0);
                    }
                    if (cropInteraction.handle.includes('w')) {
                        const newX = Math.min(Math.max(x0 + dx, 0), x0 + w0 - MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                        w = x0 + w0 - newX;
                        x = newX;
                    }
                    if (cropInteraction.handle.includes('n')) {
                        const newY = Math.min(Math.max(y0 + dy, 0), y0 + h0 - MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                        h = y0 + h0 - newY;
                        y = newY;
                    }
                    crop.x = x;
                    crop.y = y;
                    crop.w = w;
                    crop.h = h;
                    const handleDx = cropInteraction.handle.includes('e') ? Math.abs(dx) : cropInteraction.handle.includes('w') ? -Math.abs(dx) : 0;
                    const handleDy = cropInteraction.handle.includes('s') ? Math.abs(dy) : cropInteraction.handle.includes('n') ? -Math.abs(dy) : 0;
                    applyCropConstraints(crop, handleDx, handleDy);
                }
                if (cropInteraction.type === 'create') {
                    crop.x = Math.min(cropInteraction.startX, naturalX);
                    crop.y = Math.min(cropInteraction.startY, naturalY);
                    crop.w = Math.abs(naturalX - cropInteraction.startX);
                    crop.h = Math.abs(naturalY - cropInteraction.startY);
                    crop.w = Math.max(crop.w, MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                    crop.h = Math.max(crop.h, MIN_CROP_SIZE);
                    applyCropConstraints(crop, dx, dy);
                }
                updateCropOverlayItem(crop);
                syncCropItemInputs(crop);
                updateCropMiniPanel();
            }
            function handleCropPointerUp(e) {
                if (!cropInteraction || cropInteraction.pointerId !== e.pointerId) return;
                if (D.cropOverlay.hasPointerCapture(cropInteraction.pointerId)) {
                    D.cropOverlay.releasePointerCapture(cropInteraction.pointerId);
                }
                cropInteraction = null;
                document.body.style.userSelect = '';
                updateCropExportStatus();
            }
            async function processImageSplit() {
                if (!state.imageElement || state.viewMode === 'crop') return;
                if (state.mode === 'shape') { alert('形状分割功能正在开发中！'); return; }
                D.splitBtn.disabled = true; D.splitBtn.innerHTML = `处理中...`;
                await new Promise(res => setTimeout(res, 50));
                state.splitResults = [];
                const { width, height } = state.imageElement;
                const sliceWidth = width / state.cols; const sliceHeight = height / state.rows;
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                canvas.width = sliceWidth; canvas.height = sliceHeight;
                const mimeType = `image/${state.outputFormat}`;
                const extension = state.outputFormat === 'jpeg' ? 'jpg' : state.outputFormat;
                for (let r = 0; r < state.rows; r++) {
                    for (let c = 0; c < state.cols; c++) {
                        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, sliceWidth, sliceHeight);
                        if (state.outputFormat === 'jpeg') { ctx.fillStyle = '#FFFFFF'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, sliceWidth, sliceHeight); }
                        ctx.drawImage(state.imageElement, c * sliceWidth, r * sliceHeight, sliceWidth, sliceHeight, 0, 0, sliceWidth, sliceHeight);
                        state.splitResults.push({
                            dataUrl: canvas.toDataURL(mimeType, 0.9),
                            filename: `${state.imageFile.name.split('.').slice(0, -1).join('.')}_${r+1}x${c+1}.${extension}`,
                        });
                    }
                }
                renderResults();
                D.splitBtn.disabled = false; D.splitBtn.innerHTML = `<svg class="icon"><use href="#icon-cut"></use></svg> 分割图片`;
            }
            function renderResults() {
                D.results.style.display = 'flex';
                const gallery = D.resultsGallery;
                gallery.innerHTML = '';
                const galleryCols = state.cols;
                gallery.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${galleryCols}, 1fr)`;
                D.resultsInfoText.innerHTML = `<span>创建部分:<b>${state.splitResults.length}</b></span><span>格式:<b>${formatLabel(state.outputFormat)}</b></span><span>分割模式:<b>${D.previewInfoMode.textContent}</b></span>`;
                state.splitResults.forEach((item) => {
                    const itemEl = document.createElement('div');
                    itemEl.className = 'result-item';
                    itemEl.innerHTML = `<img src="${item.dataUrl}" alt="${item.filename}" loading="lazy"><div class="result-item-overlay"><a href="${item.dataUrl}" download="${item.filename}" class="overlay-btn download-single" title="下载"><svg class="icon"><use href="#icon-download"></use></svg></a></div>`;
                    gallery.appendChild(itemEl);
                });
            }
            async function downloadAllAsZip() {
                const zip = new JSZip();
                state.splitResults.forEach(item => zip.file(item.filename, item.dataUrl.split(',')[1], { base64: true }));
                const content = await zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' });
                const zipFilename = `${state.imageFile.name.split('.').slice(0, -1).join('.')}.zip`;
                saveAs(content, zipFilename);
            }
            initEventListeners();
            resetWorkspace();
        })();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

使用帮助

1. 上传帧图片

拖放图片到上传区域，或点击"选择图片"按钮上传，支持JPG、PNG、WebP格式。

2. 调整帧顺序

拖动帧可以调整顺序，点击帧上的上下箭头也可以移动位置。

3. 设置帧时长

可以为每帧设置单独的时长，或使用"统一帧时长"批量设置（单位：毫秒，数值越大动画越慢）。

4. 预览动画

点击"播放"按钮预览动画效果，进度条显示当前播放位置。

5. 导出设置说明

  • 输出尺寸：默认"原始尺寸"（使用第一帧图片尺寸），500x500/300x300为固定正方形尺寸
  • 循环次数：默认"无限循环"（0=无限），1次/3次为播放指定次数后停止
  • 图片质量：1-10分（默认7分），分数越高图片越清晰，但文件体积越大；分数越低压缩率越高，可能出现轻微失真

6. 导出GIF

设置完成后点击"导出GIF"，等待进度条完成后会自动下载。
